required_resolutions: Assign a lead software engineer or system owner to assume responsibility for the component.
Migrate development environment credentials to verified secrets managers immediately.
Configure the specific model variant and hosting region in system properties.
Acquire technical lead cryptographical signature authorization in the compliance portal.
Document the concrete business goals and customer data paths utilized by the AI component.
Add a brief system summary mapping the component to corporate AI use case registers.
Review model provider terms to verify training exclusion and data privacy protections.
Complete the risk assessment survey to categorize the integration (e.g. Minimal, High risk).
Document human oversight procedures and validation gates implemented for LLM outputs.
Define log aggregation constraints and specify standard data purging intervals.
Verify if user disclosures are required and ensure notices are present on front-end components.
Conduct a DPIA to evaluate potential risks of transferring user identifiers to third-party endpoints.
recommended_next_action: Action Required: Resolve all blocking evidence gaps (e.g. migrate plaintext env credentials and define system owners) before exporting.
